race.comment: BEATTY (1) resumes today for the Casey stable and was very impressive in his two runs before a break. His trial coming in was very good and the effort he turned in before the break is one of the highest 2YO figures produced this season. He creates plenty of excitement in his return. HE'S A MACHINO (2) bolted in at the trials before running into Aurum Belle on resumption in the Supremacy Stakes. He'll be fitter for that run and the better draw today is a big tick. Drops in weight and can get the job done with the added fitness on his side. BOY CRUSH (4) comes here without a trial after going under narrowly as the odds-on favourite before a short break. CJP rides now in a good push for his chances and he can fire. WOLF WHISTLE ZEL (3) trialled behind a subsequent winner recently and showed enough in his first campaign when winning as an odds-on pop. Won't be far away. AFIREOFGIDGEECOALS (7) can be handy from the inside draw and should get his chance if good enough.
